stories.title: Cubs 10, Nationals 2 — Horton Sets Franchise Record

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Cubs 10, Nationals 2.

Cade Horton: 6.1 IP, 2 ER, 75 pitches. 13 consecutive starts allowing ≤2 ER — a new Cubs FRANCHISE RECORD.

The previous mark was set by Ed Reulbach. In 1909.

Ian Happ 3-run HR. Miguel Amaya goes deep. Series tied 1-1. 🔥

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Horton's Brilliance — The Franchise Record in Context

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Cade Horton broke a Cubs pitching record that stood for 117 years.

That's not a hot streak. That's a different level.

While Steele, Wicks, and Hodge sit on the IL — Horton shows up and cements himself as Chicago's ace.

We have our guy.

#Cubs #CubsBaseball #MLB

stories.title: Miguel Amaya — HR and Two RBI, the Young Catcher Is Arriving

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Miguel Amaya: HR, 2 RBI, 2-for-4 in Game 2.

The kid is 25 years old and playing like he belongs. With 3 catchers on the roster, Amaya is making this decision easy.

Young core. PCA. Horton. Amaya. The future is right now.

#Cubs #ChicagoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Game 3 Today — Cubs Close the Homestand vs. Nationals at 1:20 PM

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Game 3. 1:20 PM CT. Wrigley Field.

Cubs and Nationals for the series win. After getting embarrassed 10-4 on Opening Day, the Cubs won 10-2 yesterday.

This is what good teams do — they bounce back. Now close it out.

Let's FLY THE W. ⚾

#Cubs #FlyTheW #WrigleyField

stories.title: PCA Post-Extension — 2 Hits the Day After Signing $115M

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Pete Crow-Armstrong signed a $115M extension.

Then went 2-for-4 the next day like it was just another Sunday.

$115M. Two hits. No celebration. Just baseball.

That's why you pay the man.

#Cubs #GoCubs #NorthSiders

stories.title: Justin Steele Rotation Update — Live BP, Looking Like Justin Again

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Justin Steele threw live BP in Arizona this week.

Results: 19 pitches, 3 Ks, curveball back. Pitching coach Tommy Hottovy: "Looks like Justin."

Target return: late May or June. Horton holds down the rotation until then.

#Cubs #CubsBaseball #MLB

stories.title: Bregman's Early Days as a Cub — What $175M Looks Like in March

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Alex Bregman is 2 games into his Cubs career.

1-for-4 on Opening Day. Standing ovation from the home crowd.

He's had better starts. He's had worse. But the $175M man has 160 more games to make his case.

The Cardinals settled. We didn't.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB
